summary: Phase 5 UI/UX Polish Testing COMPLETE. 11/11 backend API tests PASSED (100%). All 19 frontend features verified working. Dark theme (#0F0F0F bg, #1A1A1A cards), personal welcome messages (first login + welcome back with date), clickable header, image-first project cards with placeholders, visual file gallery, micro-interactions with hover effects and transitions. Skeleton loading states working. All styling matches specifications.

minor.issue: Intermittent 500 errors due to Supabase connection pool limit (FATAL: MaxClientsInSessionMode). Resolved after backend restart.

passed_tests: Login page renders with dark theme (#0F0F0F bg, #1A1A1A card, violet button)
Login flow works with credentials: emmanuelobokoh03@gmail.com / successful26#
Dashboard shows 'Welcome to KOLOR STUDIO, {name}!' for first login (data-testid='welcome-first-login')
After refresh, dashboard shows 'Good evening, {name}' with current date (data-testid='welcome-back')
KOLOR STUDIO header is clickable and navigates back to dashboard (data-testid='header-logo-link')
Stats cards are interactive - clicking them filters leads (filter badge appears)
Kanban board renders with colored column headers (New=blue, Contacted=purple, Quoted=orange)
Lead cards show image placeholders (gradient bg with ImageIcon) for cards without coverImage
Add Lead modal opens with cover image upload section (data-testid='cover-image-upload-btn')
Add Lead modal has project type selector (4 cards: Service, Commission, Project, Product Sale)
Add Lead modal has client info section (name, email, phone, company)
Add Lead modal has deliverable type selector (6 options)
LeadDetailModal opens when clicking a lead card
LeadDetailModal shows 5 tabs: Activity, Quotes, Files, Details, Deliverables
Files tab shows visual gallery grid with upload dropzone (data-testid='file-dropzone')
Activity tab shows timeline with notes input (data-testid='note-input')
Skeleton loading states appear (animate-pulse classes detected)
All buttons have hover transitions (rounded-xl corners, transition classes)
View mode toggle works (kanban/list/analytics/calendar/portfolio)
Search input works for filtering leads
Project type and industry filter dropdowns work
Backend: Login returns user with firstName field
Backend: /auth/me returns user profile
Backend: /leads/stats returns dashboard data
Backend: Leads API returns coverImage field
Backend: Leads filter by projectType works
Backend: Leads filter by industry works
Backend: Create lead with coverImage field works
Backend: /leads/upload-cover requires auth (401)
Backend: /leads/upload-cover requires file (400)
Backend: Activities endpoint works
Backend: Files endpoint works
critical_code_review_comments: Part A (Personal Welcome): First login message uses localStorage 'kolor_has_logged_in' flag - works correctly
Part A (Header): KOLOR STUDIO header has data-testid='header-logo-link' and navigates to dashboard on click
Part B (Image-first cards): coverImage field on Lead model, gradient placeholder for null images with ImageIcon
Part C (Visual File Gallery): Files tab shows grid layout with thumbnails, hover overlay with filename and download/delete buttons
Part D (Typography): text-3xl (30px) page titles, #0F0F0F bg, #1A1A1A cards, #FAFAFA headings verified
Part E (Micro-interactions): hover effects and transition-all classes on buttons/cards, skeleton loading with animate-pulse
seed_data_creation: No new test data created - used existing leads from previous phases
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 UI/UX Polish fully tested. All 5 parts implemented: A) Personal welcome messages (first login uses localStorage 'kolor_has_logged_in', welcome back shows greeting + date), B) Image-first project cards (coverImage field, gradient placeholder), C) Visual file gallery (grid layout, hover overlay), D) Typography & spacing verified (#0F0F0F bg, #1A1A1A cards, text-3xl titles), E) Micro-interactions (hover effects, transitions, skeleton loading). Project at /app/kolor-studio-v2/. Key data-testids: welcome-first-login, welcome-back, header-logo-link, cover-image-upload-btn, file-dropzone, file-gallery.
